Title: Successful submission with valid details
Preconditions: User is on the Contact Us page
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Contact Us page
2. Fill in all required fields with valid data
3. Click the Submit button
4. Observe and verify the result
Expected Result: Form is submitted successfully and a confirmation message is displayed to the user.

Title: Missing mandatory fields
Preconditions: User is on the Contact Us page
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Contact Us page
2. Leave one or more mandatory fields empty
3. Click the Submit button
4. Observe and verify the result
Expected Result: Inline validation messages are displayed for each empty mandatory field.

Title: Invalid email format
Preconditions: User is on the Contact Us page
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Contact Us page
2. Fill in all required fields with valid data
3. Click the Submit button
4. Observe and verify the result
Expected Result: An error message indicating an invalid email format is displayed.
